title: Commencement of succession
doc_html:
CHAPTER 4.  COMMENCEMENT OF SUCCESSION

Art. 934.  Commencement of succession

Succession occurs at the death of a person.

Acts 1997, No. 1421, §1, eff. July 1, 1999.
